Special Effect Flags

Mini-bossNo
Rare modeRandom rare effect enabledThis enemy can roll from the rare-effect families exposed by the client cache.
Effect poolNo named rare family
Loot source modelSpawner-linked loot

The client cache does not publish exact random-effect multipliers for this enemy. Use the enemy effects guide for the global summary of what is exposed.

Open enemy effects guide

Equipment

  • Ship sprite/base stats: Enemy Nexar Probe Enemy Nexar Probe
  • Engine: Enemy Nexar Probe
  • Loot: Artifact 30%, Alien Alloy, Fusion Core, Big Metal Scrap, Artifact 1%, Radiated Junk
  • Weapon: Enemy Nexar Repair Probe range 0-500
